name: promote-rules-to-skills
description: Promote project rule files (.claude/rules/*.md) into auto-discoverable Claude Code skills (.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md). Hybrid pattern for always-on disciplines (slim subset stays in rules, full detail becomes a skill), drops redundant rules, migrates dormant flat skill files, verifies live discovery, and rewires the root router. Claude Code only. Manual invocation only.
